classifications.rationale: Factory function for creating proxy connections; adapted to service builder pattern with translate_pproxy_args underneath
classifications.notes: pproxy.Connection is an alias for proxies_by_uri; eggress uses PPProxyService.from_args with pproxy-style CLI arg translation

classifications.rationale: Global sentinel for direct connection; eggress uses direct:// URI scheme instead of a module-level constant
classifications.notes: pproxy.DIRECT is a ProxyDirect sentinel object; eggress encodes 'direct' via URI scheme, not a global constant

classifications.rationale: Rule compilation from file; adapted to --rulefile flag translation and -b block regex rules in TOML config
classifications.notes: pproxy.Rule is compile_rule(filename); eggress translates rulefile lines to reject rules via PproxyRuleFile::load()

classifications.rationale: Server factory function; adapted to Server and PPProxyService classes with full lifecycle management
classifications.notes: pproxy.Server is proxies_by_uri(uri_jumps); eggress.Server accepts listen/remote URI lists; PPProxyService adds from_args/from_uri/from_toml/from_file factories

classifications.rationale: Protocol implementation module; not intended as stable public API — used internally by pproxy server
classifications.notes: Contains BaseProtocol and subclasses (HTTP, SOCKS4/5, SS, Trojan, etc.) — these are pproxy internals

classifications.rationale: Server implementation module; not intended as stable public API — contains main(), stream_handler, proxy classes
classifications.notes: Contains ProxyDirect, ProxySimple, ProxyBackward, main(), stream_handler, etc. — pproxy implementation details

eggress_reverse_mapping.notes: Context-managed server wrapper; accepts listen/remote URI lists; adds sync/async lifecycle
Service builder with from_args/from_uri/from_toml/from_file factories; translates pproxy CLI args to TOML config
Extracts pproxy CLI arg translation as a callable; returns TranslationResult with TOML + diagnostics
Translates pproxy URI strings to eggress TOML config
Returns CompatibilityReport with tier classification, diagnostics, and parsed URIs
Parses a pproxy URI and returns UriInfo without creating a server
Redacts credentials from pproxy URI for safe display; no pproxy equivalent
Returns structured diagnostics for a pproxy URI translation
Lists pproxy protocol features supported by eggress
Structured parity assessment with tier, diagnostics, features, TOML output
Inspects pproxy reverse URIs and describes eggress translation
Top-level entry point; supports args/local/remote/config/config_path input modes
TOML-based configuration; different schema from pproxy URI-based config
Service lifecycle management with start/close/run; context manager support
Handle to running service with bound_addresses, status, metrics_text, reload_toml, shutdown
